channel.title: System broke after installing nvidia package when using Kicksecure with KDE
channel.description:
I tried kicksecure + kde in my pc with a nvidia RTX 3070, and on the moment I install nvidia packages it broke and I don’t know which could be the problem. Wayland don’t works and x11 works but the compositor don’t works well.
**I know kde is not supported but just fyi, if somebody have the same issue too, you aren’t alone jeje.**
Debian + kde worked well, so I suppose some package could be broken it.

item.title: System broke after installing nvidia package when using Kicksecure with KDE
item.dc:creator: nurmagoz
item.description:
Black login screen crash due to nouveau gsp killing labwc Development
Workaround has been added to the wiki:

Read full topic
item.source: System broke after installing nvidia package when using Kicksecure with KDE

item.title: System broke after installing nvidia package when using Kicksecure with KDE
item.dc:creator: Patrick
item.description:
We’ll document nvidia proprietary driver installation in the near future. (Expect days to weeks.)

(NVIDIA)

Once that happens, you’ll be notified here.

spartack:

kde

This might break many things. See:

Kicksecure – 21 Feb 26

Other Desktop Environments

How to use Other Desktop Environments other than LXQt with Kicksecure. Current situation. Risks. Future. (Gnome, KDE, Xfce, MATE, ...)

I suspect this being the issue and not nvidia package. For further analysis, APT installation log would be required.

Read full topic
item.source: System broke after installing nvidia package when using Kicksecure with KDE

item.description:
I tried kicksecure + kde in my pc with a nvidia RTX 3070, and on the moment I install nvidia packages it broke and I don’t know which could be the problem. Wayland don’t works and x11 works but the compositor don’t works well.

I know kde is not supported but just fyi, if somebody have the same issue too, you aren’t alone jeje.

Debian + kde worked well, so I suppose some package could be broken it.
